title: Source Card
description: Public evidence record for a single data source (a repository, API query, or synthetic generator) consumed by the lab. Required before any record derived from the source enters a dataset.

license.description: SPDX id or short terms note.

terms_note.description: Notes on API terms / rate limits / redistribution constraints.

transform.description: Reproducible command that derived records from this source.

content_hash.description: Hash of the source manifest or snapshot.

redistribution.description: What may be redistributed in this public repo for this source.
